summary: Final production audit — 39/39 backend pytest tests pass (health, security headers, system-status admin+dispatch RBAC, masters CRUD add/delete with 404 re-check, RBAC on masters, 27-endpoint smoke sweep across master-dispatch/asn/eway/vendor-ack/reports/packing/admin/modules). Frontend UI sweep of 13 routes as admin + 4 routes as dispatch: NO console errors, NO failed /api requests, footer shows 'v1.0.0', all 5 Settings tabs render, MastersPanel plants+transporters add/delete cycle works via UI (list refreshes correctly), SystemStatusPanel renders all 8 status cards + queues + failures + refresh, dispatch user is redirected away from /portal/settings.

verified_endpoints.health_internal: GET http://localhost:8001/health -> 200 {status:ok, version:1.0.0} with X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy headers
verified_endpoints.system_status_admin: 200 with version=1.0.0, database.ok=true, backup.ok=true (backup_test_database_20260714_180916.gz found at /var/backups/grewal), playwright.ok, gemini.ok, automation.mode=test, disk/cpu/memory/recent_failures all present
verified_endpoints.masters_crud: GET/POST/DELETE /master-dispatch/plants and /transporters — admin add+delete works, second DELETE -> 404, dispatch POST/DELETE -> 403

verified_ui.footer: '© 2026 Grewal Engineering Works. All Rights Reserved. · v1.0.0' (version populated from /api/health after ~1-2s)
verified_ui.masters_panel: plants: 2 (default) -> 3 (after add TEST UI PLANT 2) -> 2 (after delete); transporters add+delete cycle also verified via data-testid selectors
verified_ui.system_status_panel: system-status-panel + all 8 cards (status-api/database/playwright/gemini/disk/memory/cpu/backup) + status-queues + status-failures + system-status-refresh all render
verified_ui.admin_page_sweep: /portal, /portal/master-dispatch/{list,create,bulk,search,daily-report}, /portal/modules/{packing,asn,eway-bill,vendor-ack}, /portal/reports, /portal/settings — 0 console errors, 0 failed /api requests, deep-link reload persists session
verified_ui.dispatch_rbac: /portal/settings redirects to /portal for dispatch user; /portal/master-dispatch/list, /portal/modules/asn, /portal/reports all accessible
verified_ui.invalid_route: /portal/nonexistent-xyz redirects to landing / (Route path='*' -> <Navigate to='/'>). Note: request spec suggested 'falls into modules placeholder OR redirects without crash' — current behavior is redirect, non-crashing, acceptable.

not_tested: Automation ASN seed+run end-to-end via mongosh — skipped because /tmp/pdi_test.pdf is NOT present in the container (would have required creating a synthetic PDF and inserting an md doc). Main agent has previously verified test-mode automation. Vendor-ack import + eway list detailed screenshots not exercised beyond 200 smoke check.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py defines BOTH /health (bare) and /api/health — redundant but harmless. Kubernetes ingress only exposes /api/*, so external monitors/uptime checks must hit /api/health (not /health).

App.js catch-all Route path='*' -> <Navigate to='/' replace/>. For invalid /portal/* subpaths (e.g., /portal/master-dispatch/bulk-upload — note: correct path is /bulk), users get bounced to public landing which may confuse authenticated users. Consider redirecting to /portal (dashboard) when authenticated instead.

MastersPanel uses data-testid={masters-plants-delete-${name}} — will produce invalid selectors for names containing special characters (e.g., '.', '/', quotes). Current defaults are fine but a future entry could break tests.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (0 console errors, 0 failed API calls across 17 route visits)

seed_data_creation: None persisted. Test plants/transporters (TEST PLANT X, TEST TRANSPORTER X, TEST UI PLANT 2, TEST UI TRANS) all deleted at end of their tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portal is production-ready. Backend tests file /app/backend/tests/test_production_audit.py is idempotent and cleans up TEST_* seeded data. Public URL only exposes /api/*; /health bare endpoint is internal-only. Correct bulk-upload route is /portal/master-dispatch/bulk (NOT /bulk-upload). Backup file at /var/backups/grewal/backup_test_database_20260714_180916.gz — do not delete. AUTOMATION_MODE=test — one run at a time (409 on concurrent).
